name: design.md
description: DESIGN.md design system skill - applies design tokens and guidelines to UI development
author: LinearMouseSim Team

capabilities.name: apply-design-tokens
capabilities.description: Apply design tokens from DESIGN.md to UI components

capabilities.name: generate-theme
capabilities.description: Generate theme code from DESIGN.md tokens

trigger: when designing or modifying UI components, check DESIGN.md for design tokens

execution.pre_condition: DESIGN.md file exists in project root
steps: 1. Read DESIGN.md file from project root
2. Parse YAML front matter for design tokens
3. Apply colors, typography, spacing, and component styles
